things.name: Machu Picchu
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Inca citadel above the clouds - take the Hiram Bingham train

things.name: Sacred Valley of the Incas
things.description: Pisac market, Ollantaytambo fortress and salt pans of Maras

things.name: Sacsayhuaman Fortress
things.description: Megalithic Inca fortress above Cusco with stones weighing 360 tons

things.name: Plaza de Armas
things.description: Inca square at the heart of the former Inca Empire capital with cathedral and La Compania

things.name: Inca Trail Hike
things.description: 4-day classic trek through cloud forest and Inca ruins to Machu Picchu

things.name: Qorikancha (Sun Temple)
things.description: Most sacred Inca temple - its gold-lined walls were stripped by the Spanish conquistadors

things.name: San Pedro Market
things.description: Local market with Andean superfoods, guinea pig and traditional textiles

things.name: Rainbow Mountain (Vinicunca)
things.description: Striped mineral mountain at 5,200m with extraordinary coloured layers

things.name: Pisco Sour at Museo del Pisco
things.description: Peru's national cocktail made from Quebranta grapes at its finest bar

things.name: Inti Raymi Festival (June 24)
things.description: Festival of the Sun at Sacsayhuaman - Cusco's greatest Inca ceremony
